paper_title: DeepQMLP: A Scalable Quantum-Classical Hybrid Deep Neural Network Architecture for Classification

key_advantages.noise_resilience: DeepQMLP has greater resilience to noise compared to QNN models with deep quantum circuits

performance_metrics.loss_reduction: Up to 25.3% lower loss than QMLP
performance_metrics.accuracy_improvement: 7.92% higher accuracy than QMLP during inference under noise

technical_details.circuit_design: Shallow circuits provide greater robustness against quantum noises (less accumulation of gate errors and decoherence)
technical_details.optimization_challenges: Deep PQC with many parameters may experience vanishing gradient problems (barren plateaus)
technical_details.quantum_hardware_issues: Quantum computers are plagued with various noise sources

title: DeepQMLP: A Scalable Quantum-Classical Hybrid Deep Neural Network Architecture for Classification
